benefits.description: Reduced appetite suppression when restarting after 3-month break; had to titrate up quickly to regain effects

side_effects.description: Gained weight back during 3-month break from tirzepatide

protocol_notes: Was off tirzepatide for ~3 months due to shortage and other circumstances; gained weight back; when restarting, lower doses were ineffective despite prior tolerance having built up; no negative side effects even jumping back to 5mg abruptly; had to titrate up quickly past previous stopping point; considering adding MOTS-C or AOD 9604
